nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for mechanical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to academic integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to speed up certain tasks

nodes.label: AI as structural foundation for lesson planning
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated lessons lacking personality and engagement
nodes.grounding_span: The lesson plans are usually bland, they are generally well structured but drab

nodes.label: AI as tool for generating practice materials
nodes.label_negative: AI as shortcut for student cheating
nodes.grounding_span: I use Ai to generate additional questions for curriculum content

nodes.label: Human teacher's personal touch in slideshows and video lessons
nodes.grounding_span: I make the slideshows, it has to have my own personality in it

nodes.label: AI for teaching mechanics of math
nodes.grounding_span: I would love to have AI teach the mechanics of calculating the mean, median and mode, but for me to take a dive into the conceptual understanding

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner for iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I will collaborate with it if I am making a worksheet, I will keep suggesting adjustments

nodes.label: AI as learning tool for self-study
nodes.grounding_span: I started exploring the 'study and learn' tools I got obsessed and taught myself a whole bunch of new math concepts

nodes.label: AI delegation for uninteresting skills
nodes.grounding_span: If I find a skill interesting I will learn it inside and out, but if I don't I will find a shortcut

nodes.label: AI for data entry and organization
nodes.label_negative: AI for deep discussion between student and teacher
nodes.grounding_span: I would love AI to save me lots of time entering and organizing data but deep discussion needs to be between student and teacher

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to speed up certain tasks

nodes.label: Student engagement and excitement
nodes.grounding_span: I want students to be excited

nodes.label: Human social connection
nodes.grounding_span: Human health is based on human social connection

nodes.label: Deep conceptual understanding
nodes.grounding_span: take a dive into the conceptual understanding of these terms

nodes.label: Expertise and mastery
nodes.grounding_span: To be an expert you need to know a thing well

nodes.label: Academic integrity
nodes.grounding_span: We need to figure systems to ensure academic integrity fast

nodes.label: Positive excitement about AI learning tools
nodes.grounding_span: I got obsessed and taught myself a whole bunch of new math concepts

nodes.label: Negative view of AI as threat and cheating tool
nodes.grounding_span: Teachers are afraid and see AI as a threat

nodes.label: Positive desire for AI to automate data entry
nodes.grounding_span: I need it to save me a lot of time, inputting data

nodes.label: Negative concern about students abusing AI
nodes.grounding_span: it can be frightening to see students be pulled in lose so much precious time abusing and being abused by technology

nodes.label: Iterative refinement and perfectionism
nodes.grounding_span: I will keep suggesting adjustments with a canvas until it gets stuck and I take over to perfect it

nodes.label: Domain-based delegation: interesting vs. uninteresting skills
nodes.grounding_span: If I find a skill interesting I will learn it inside and out, but if I don't I will find a shortcut
